Confidential CN Term Sheet (MNPI): Proposed Series C Preferred Share investment in Qishan Integrated Optoelectronics Co., Ltd.; information herein is inside information under the PRC Securities Law until formally announced via SSE disclosure.
Parties: Investor — Harborview Delta Fund SPC–Subfund A (Cayman); Issuer — Qishan Integrated Optoelectronics Co., Ltd. (USCC: 91A0 8Z3Q 00X0 0X9Y 1, reg. seat: Fictitious Science Park, Yuelu District, Changsha).
Transaction: RMB 220,000,000 for 12% Series C, pre-money RMB 1,540,000,000; liquidation preference 1x non-participating; one board seat to Investor; customary anti-dilution and veto list.
Use of proceeds: expand microLED line (product names: Aurora-Pixel X3, NeoDriver 7), repay supplier credit; no funds used for data brokerage or unrelated devices; ordinary course capex only.
Listing: Company targets STAR Market (SSE) filing within 18 months; CSRC registration to follow; issuer will prepare prospectus drafts and maintain insider lists per CSRC guidance; no public marketing until approval.
Conditions precedent: SAMR anti-monopoly filing if turnover threshold met; DSL compliance with critical data self-assessment; MLPS level-3 certification for core network; SAFE registration for inbound capital; completion of vendor legal opinions.
Data/PIPL: processing limited to transaction diligence; no minors under 14 data; any resident ID copies redacted; cross-border transfer (if any) to Investor’s counsel requires CAC security assessment or standard contract filing; primary data room in Beijing with backup node in Chengdu; no biometric templates in scope.
Finance contact cluster — Mr. He Yuchen (DOB 1989-11-02, age 36), Role: VP Finance at Qishan; office: Building 3, Pudong New Area (fict.), Shanghai; device tag: CN-PD-Fin-RedMi-7A; payroll ref: GL-1130-HE-1102; internal a c c t: he.yuchen@qishan-opto.cn; res i d e n t I D (masked): 31 0X 1989 1 1 0 2 **** 12X3; s e s s: sh_pd_0034 via https://intranet.qishan-opto.cn/auth?s=he_1102&loc=PD.
Separated weak IDs (non-identifying): common test device QX-202 used by 25–35-year-old engineers in Nanshan District; generic VPN pool name “SZ-R&D-02”; sample birth month “1993-05” without name; these do not alone identify any person.
Employment & ESOP: 10% post-money option pool; onboarding workflows keep HRIS resident IDs salted/hashed; during diligence only aggregated attrition rates and salary bands are shared; public-source references may include MIIT bulletins and anonymized industry whitepapers.
Confidentiality/MNPI: parties acknowledge receipt of inside information; no A-share trading of issuer’s suppliers or customers on the basis of this information until publicly disclosed via SSE; Insider List maintained per CSRC Announcement [fictional]-2026-07.
Compliance carve-outs: no MAC (Material Adverse Change) shall be deemed to occur due to sector-wide chip cycle; for clarity, device M A C addresses and IMEI values are not collected in the data room, and IPs are logged only in truncated form.
Cyber/CSL undertakings: endpoint logging limited to pseudonymous IDs; device inventories tagged by role (e.g., “Finance-Tablet-7A”) not by name; any cross-border log export paused pending CAC filing; data mapping retained for 3 years in PRC.
Closing mechanics: funds to be wired to designated capital account at a fictitious bank upon CP satisfaction; for test purposes an obfuscated bank ref appears as CN- B A N K - 88 4 5 - XX29; VAT invoice workflow will be performed via e-fapiao portal; no beneficial ownership changes before closing.
Governing law/dispute: PRC law governs; disputes to be submitted to Shanghai Arbitration Commission; language Chinese with English convenience translation.
Notices and contacts: Ms. Lin Xiaoyu (Legal Counsel), lin.xiaoyu@qishan-opto.cn; Investor contact: Dr. Rao Min, rao.min@harborview-delta.com; ordinary project updates will use lowercase project notes and do not contain personal data.
